obs: User has Crohn's disease and experiencing fatigue; checked iron levels with doctor; assistant recommended exercise, hydration, healthy diet, rest.
Practices yoga around 6:30pm weekdays after work; set calendar reminders; considering Yoga With Adriene YouTube channel.
Plays guitar; practicing ukulele lessons with friend Rachel; works on fingerpicking technique; received Taylor GS Mini from partner.
First Blue Apron meal kit delivery received: salmon with roasted veggies, chicken fajitas, veggie stir-fry.
Does meditation; part of evening routine with yoga and guitar practice; reads before bed to reduce screen time.
Took 5-day trip to Chicago last month; used black Fjallraven Kanken backpack; found it comfortable and spacious.
Planning 4-day NYC trip; interested in Statue of Liberty, Central Park, Met museum, MoMA, High Line, Brooklyn Bridge Park.
Navy blue blazer picked up from dry cleaners; worn to meeting January 10th.
Lent green sweater to sister January 25th; tracking borrowed items in closet with label 'On Loan'.
Received silver necklace from partner on Valentine's Day; planning to wear to wedding March 15th.
Red cocktail dress being altered by tailor to shorten it; wedding March 15th; excited to wear with silver necklace.
Exchanged sandals February 5th for larger size; planning to wear with yellow sundress to wedding.
Bought chicken breasts from Walmart last Sunday; modifying Lemon Garlic Chicken recipe with Yukon Gold potatoes, roasted veggies.
Has Cabernet Sauvignon from Trader Joe's 'Two-Buck Chuck'; assistant advised letting it breathe, pairing with potatoes.
Owns 2018 Honda Camry; got oil change and tire rotation last week; planning road trip; parks on street overnight.
Selling 2007 Honda CBR600RR motorcycle; listed $3,500 on Craigslist January 20th; considering competitive pricing strategy.
Received $50 parking ticket January 5th near work.
Car wash cost $15; cleaned one week before Camry service appointment.
Bike gear adjustment $40 January 25th; bike lights $20; flat tire repair January 15th.
New laptop backpack arrived January 20th from Amazon; carries work laptop daily to/from office; super comfortable with ample space.
New stylus pen; uses laptop's touchscreen frequently; found very handy for taking notes.
New running shorts from outlet store downtown; worn 3 times; breathable fabric with built-in liner improved performance.
Considering water bottle with insulation and built-in filter for outdoor activities.
Planning to participate in charity bike ride soon; bike needs service at new shop near apartment.
Installed high-end NVIDIA graphics card February 10th (purchased December); huge difference in FPS gaming (Call of Duty, Halo).
Cleaned desktop computer February 1st; removed dust/dirt from fans, vents; improved performance noticeably.
Spent $50 on silver necklace for sister's birthday last month; organizing gift receipts; planning gift spreadsheet with categories.
Taylor GS Mini guitar needs service at Guitar Central (mechanic: Joe); high action causing left hand discomfort; check bridge/saddle.
Hohner Special 20 harmonica; hasn't played in ages; planning to sell on eBay; researching pricing and photography tips.
Taking piano lessons for three months; just started learning Chopin's Nocturne in E-flat major; major achievement.
Interested in setting up home recording studio; wants to record piano and guitar; considering USB microphone and DAW options.
#summerFashion post featured on popular fashion influencer's page; gained extra 50 followers; planning Reels with sunglasses.
Using Nike Air Zoom Pegasus 38 running shoes for jogging; considering dedicated cycling shoes for bike rides.
Experiencing IT band and hip flexor tightness after Saturday morning bike rides; considering foam rolling exercises.
Current wireless mouse acting up; considering Logitech MX Master 3 with rechargeable battery (70-day life).
Downloaded password manager app February 12th; planning to check for security updates regularly.
Cat Luna: 2-year-old British Shorthair, perfect weight per vet; mostly indoor; loves cat tower and bird watching.
Ordered 12 packets (2kg each) Whiskas food for Luna from Petco; fills bowl twice daily; estimated 43-45 days supply.
Noticing Luna drinking more water; considering tracking water intake with measuring cup; interested in manual logging in PetMD app.
Planning to track Luna's food intake and waste output via Petnet or PetMD apps for comprehensive health monitoring.
Involved in charity event collecting donations; distributed food to homeless in community; interested in local organizations.
New gardening tools arrived January 25th; been using them extensively for weekend planting projects.
Building new raised bed for herbs; considering cedar or recycled plastic lumber; researching best materials.
Bought bag of compost from local nursery February 5th; planning to use for herb garden soil preparation.
Spent few hours February 5th organizing computer files; created new folder structure; moved work docs to cloud; unsubscribed emails.
Had laptop Wi-Fi connectivity issues; system update January 28th fixed the problem; resolved without further troubleshooting.
